sections.paragraph:
παραπλήσιος, ία, ιον (s. πλησίον; Hdt. et al.; PTebt 5, 240 [II b.c.]; 27, 72 [II b.c.]; PSI 491, 13; EpArist; Philo, Aet. M. 23; 90; Jos., Bell. 3, 82; 6, 388, Ant. 13, 63.—Also of two endings, as Polyb. 9, 41, 2; 18, 54, 2) pert. to coming alongside or near, coming near, resembling, similar (w. ὅμοιος, as Demosth. 19, 196 παρ. τούτῳ κ. ὅμοιον) ὅσα τούτοις π. Hm 6, 2, 5 (Polyb. 3, 111, 11 ταῦτα κ. τούτοις παραπλήσια). Neut. used as adv. (Thu. 7, 19, 2; Polyb. 3, 33, 7; 4, 40, 10; PTebt 5, 71 [II b.c.]=‘similarly’) ἠσθένησεν παραπλήσιον θανάτῳ he was so ill that he nearly died Phil 2:27 (v.l. θανάτου. Polyb. 1, 23, 6; Rydbeck 46–50.—B-D-F §184; Rob. 646. Cp. PMich 149, 4, 27 [II a.d.] παραπλήσιον νεκρῷ.).—DELG s.v. πέλας IV. Frisk s.v. πέλας. M-M. Spicq.

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

PTebt PTebt = The Tebtunis Papyri—List 4

PSI PSI = Papiri greci e latini: Pubblicazioni della Società Italiana—List 4

EpArist EpArist = Epistle of Aristeas, II b.c.—List 5

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

Polyb Polyb , III–II b.c.—List 5

pert. pert. = pertaining (to)

Demosth Demosth , IV b.c.—List 5

παρ.̠par. = parallel

Hm Hm = Mandates

adv. adv. = adverb, adverbially

Thu Thu , V b.c.—List 5

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

Rydbeck Rydbeck = LR., Fachprosa, vermeintliche Volkssprache und Neues Testament—List 6

B-D-F B-D-F = FBlass, ADebrunner, RFunk, A Greek Grammar of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature—List 6

Rob. Rob. = ATRobertson, A Grammar of the Greek NT in the Light of Historical Research—List 6

PMich PMich = Michigan Papyri—List 4

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Frisk Frisk = HF., Griechisches etymologisches Wörterbuch—List 6

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Spicq Spicq = CS., Lexique théologique du Nouveau Testament—Lists 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 770
